mapper.insert: INSERT INTO behavior_logs ( event_type, event_time, snapshot_url, video_url, location_id, person_id, track_key, session_id, behavior_analysis, created_at ) VALUES ( #{eventType}, #{eventTime}, #{snapshotUrl}, #{videoUrl}, #{locationId}, #{personId}, #{trackKey}, #{sessionId}, #{behaviorAnalysis}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE behavior_logs SET person_id = #{personId}, session_id = #{sessionId}, face_match_score = #{faceMatchScore}, body_match_score = #{bodyMatchScore}, quality_flag = COALESCE(#{qualityFlag}, quality_flag) WHERE id = #{id}
